s-1.ptxt: INSTALL CONTROL KNOB SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Air Conditioning System)

atten3.ptxt: When disassembling the air conditioning control assembly, eliminate static electricity by touching the vehicle body to prevent the components from being damaged.

s3.ptxt: Engage the dual push switch with dial on the switch control sub-assembly.
Engage the 3 claws and install the control knob sub-assembly.
Engage the 3 claws and install the control knob sub-assembly.

s2.ptxt: Install the switch control sub-assembly with the 5 screws.
Engage the 4 claws and install the control panel case.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL AIR CONDITIONING PANEL SUB-ASSEMBLY (for Automatic Air Conditioning System)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws and install the ornament.
Install the air conditioning panel sub-assembly with the 5 screws.
